title: Item Drops
description: Modify the appearance of dropped items and blocks.
body:
Modify the appearance of dropped items and blocks.

![Dropped Items Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FvCNWcm8/images/afe995ffdd1adeab22ad94de05fdda0da145e24c.png)

![Config Options Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FvCNWcm8/images/462a3c2d856f70e0a273abecfa47b539561da4a1.png)

### Translation

Most of my downloads come from countries where English is not the primary language! If you want to help translate any of my mods to your language, you can go to https://translate.soundsofthesun.net/projects and sign in with github to contribute!
